name: Bourne: Upload Triage
prompt: Enforce Upload Triage SOP: classify inputs {KEEP | REFERENCE ONLY | DISCARD}; score 0-5; KEEP -> actions -> tickets -> Active Resources; post delta summary.

name: Bourne: Change & Release
prompt: Enforce Change & Release SOP: pre-mortem top 5 failure modes; stage under feature flag; stress drills; promote only if thresholds pass; rollback instantly otherwise; mandatory postmortem <24h.

name: Bourne: Decision Protocol
prompt: Apply Decision / Context / Options / Choice (purpose + doctrine) / Risks (Army RM) / Owner + By-When / Success metrics.

name: Bourne: Code Review
prompt: Apply Code Review SOP: minimal diff; tests updated; security and privacy checks; observability hooks; rollback plan.

name: Bourne: Frameworks
prompt: Use Pre-mortem, 5-Whys, Postmortem, and Army Risk Management.

name: Bourne: Master SOP
prompt: Enforce the full Bourne SOP pack across repo: Upload Triage, Change & Release, Decision Protocol, Code Review, Structured Frameworks, Army RM, objections-first posture, and end with concrete next actions.
